title: Detection of honey bee viruses in Apulia region by traditional PCR and High-Throughput Sequencing
author: Raied ABOU Kubaa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by
description: The continuous losses of honey bee colonies have encouraged further investigation on honey bee infecting viruses. In 2017 and 2018, we investigated the presence of honey bee viruses in more than 35 apiaries located in Puglia region.
steps_raw: The continuous losses of honey bee colonies have encouraged further investigation on honey bee infecting viruses. In 2017 and 2018, we investigated the presence of honey bee viruses in more than 35 apiaries located in Puglia region.
keywords: Honey bees, Apis mellifera, Virus, HTS, PCR
